scripts.build:ws: asc assembly/ws/index.ts --config asconfig.ws.json --target release && node scripts/inline-ws.mjs
scripts.build:chat-app-v1: asc assembly/chat-app-v1/index.ts --config asconfig.chat-app-v1.json --target release && node scripts/embed-ui.mjs build/chat-app-v1.wasm assembly/chat-app-v1/ui.html build/chat-app-v1.wasm && node scripts/embed-meta.mjs build/chat-app-v1.wasm build/chat-app-v1.wasm "{\"id\":\"chat\",\"name\":\"Chat\",\"version\":\"v1\",\"description\":\"text only\"}"
scripts.build:chat-app-v2: asc assembly/chat-app-v2/index.ts --config asconfig.chat-app-v2.json --target release && node scripts/embed-ui.mjs build/chat-app-v2.wasm assembly/chat-app-v2/ui.html build/chat-app-v2.wasm && node scripts/embed-meta.mjs build/chat-app-v2.wasm build/chat-app-v2.wasm "{\"id\":\"chat\",\"name\":\"Chat\",\"version\":\"v2\",\"description\":\"text + image + nick\"}"
scripts.build:loader-bundles: node scripts/bundle-loader.mjs ../native/host-netroute.gen.js "NodeNetworkCore,Transport,PeerLink,parsePeerSpec,toHex,fromHex" build/host/util.js build/host/domains.js build/host/net.js build/host/net-link.js build/host/net-route.js && node scripts/bundle-loader.mjs ../native/host-ws.gen.js "setWsHandle,WsServerChannel,WsClientChannel" build/host/util.js build/host/ws/ws-abi.js build/host/ws/ws-codec.js build/host/net-frame.js && node scripts/bundle-loader.mjs ../native/host-capbridge.gen.js "createCapBridge,capPreamble,opsForCaps,guestSignScope,CAP,CAP_DOMAINS,toHex,fromHex,concatBytes" build/host/util.js build/host/domains.js build/host/cap-bridge.js && node scripts/bundle-loader.mjs ../native/host-installer.gen.js "setPolicy,loadBundleFiles" build/host/util.js build/host/domains.js build/host/bundle.js build/host/policy.js build/host/native-shim.js
scripts.build:loader-wasm: npm run build:kernel && npm run build:ws && npm run build:browser-sodium && node scripts/copy-loader-wasm.mjs
scripts.build:loader: npm run build:host && npm run build:loader-bundles && npm run build:loader-wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:kernel && npm run build:ws && npm run build:host && npm run build:host:min
scripts.build:browser: npm run build && npm run build:chat-app-v1 && npm run build:chat-app-v2 && npm run build:browser-sodium
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:fixtures && node tests/run.mjs
